name: Scanned - Entity Details & Payment Instructions
prompt:
This is a SCANNED SSI document (image-based PDF). It contains entity identification details and detailed payment instructions. The document quality may vary. Look for:
- An entity details table with identification codes (MEI, GIIN, LEI)
- Payment instructions organized by currency, each with intermediary bank, beneficiary bank, and payment reference details

Since this is a scanned image, carefully read all text including small print. Preserve all codes, account numbers, and SWIFT codes exactly as shown. If any field is unclear, include it with a note about uncertainty.
